questions.question: Researchers of which university produced India’s first gene-edited sheep?

questions.option_1: Provide compensation for cyber fraud victims
questions.option_4: Launch an online cyber safety portal

questions.question: Which of the following organisations launched the Bharatpol platform to enhance coordination with Interpol in January 2025?

In which city is India's first AI-focused Special Economic Zone (SEZ) being established in 2025?

questions.question: Who became the first Indian space tourist in 2025, joining the crew for Amazon founder Jeff Bezos’ Blue Origin’s NS-25 mission?

questions.question: In March 2025, the Gujarat government launched which scheme to uplift 50,000 Antyodaya families through economic development and women empowerment programmes?

Which state is in the news for achieving full functional literacy in May 2025?
What was the outcome of the 2025 Delhi Legislative Assembly elections?
questions.option_1: Congress won for the first time in over a decade.
questions.option_2: BJP won a majority, forming the government.
questions.option_3: Hung assembly; a coalition was formed between BJP and Congress.
questions.option_4: AAP retained power with an increased majority.

questions.question: Which undersea defence weapon was successfully trialed by the Indian Navy in May 2025?

questions.option_2: National Institution for Transforming India (NITI) Aayog

questions.question: Which of the following Indian states received a World Bank loan of ₹2,424 crore to upgrade healthcare?

questions.option_1: He broke the world record for the longest javelin throw.
questions.option_2: He became the 2ⁿᵈ Indian athlete to surpass the 90-metre mark in javelin throw.
questions.option_3: He became the 1ˢᵗ Indian athlete to surpass the 90-metre mark in javelin throw.
questions.option_4: He became the 3ʳᵈ Indian athlete to surpass the 90-metre mark in javelin throw.
